# ClassicWrench - Classic Car Mechanics Directory

## About ClassicWrench
ClassicWrench is the premier directory of classic car mechanics and restoration shops across the United States. We connect classic car enthusiasts with expert mechanics who specialize in vintage automobile restoration, maintenance, and repair.

## What We Offer
- Comprehensive directory of 80+ verified classic car mechanics
- Coverage across all 50 US states
- Detailed information about each mechanic's specialties, services, and expertise
- Customer reviews and ratings for informed decision-making
- Advanced search and filtering capabilities
- Mobile-responsive design for on-the-go access

## Key Features
- **Verified Mechanics**: Every mechanic is thoroughly researched and verified
- **Specialized Expertise**: Find specialists for specific makes (Porsche, Ferrari, British sports cars, muscle cars, etc.)
- **Nationwide Coverage**: Coast-to-coast directory of restoration experts
- **Detailed Profiles**: Complete information about services, certifications, and contact details
- **Real Reviews**: Authentic customer experiences and ratings
- **Advanced Search**: Filter by location, specialty, make, price range, and more

## Specialties Covered
- Pre-war classic restoration
- Porsche air-cooled specialists
- Ferrari restoration experts
- British sports car mechanics (MG, Triumph, Jaguar, Austin-Healey)
- American muscle car specialists (Camaro, Mustang, Challenger, GTO)
- European luxury classics (Mercedes-Benz, BMW, Aston Martin)
- Custom builds and restomods
- Race car preparation and restoration
- Japanese classics (Datsun Z-cars, Toyota Supra, etc.)

## Services Available
- Complete frame-off restorations
- Engine rebuilds and performance upgrades
- Paint and bodywork
- Interior restoration and upholstery
- Electrical system repair and modernization
- Brake and suspension upgrades
- Parts sourcing and fabrication
- Pre-purchase inspections
- Concours preparation
- Storage services

## Geographic Coverage
We cover mechanics in all major markets including:
- California (Los Angeles, San Francisco, San Diego)
- Texas (Houston, Dallas, Austin)
- Florida (Miami, Tampa, Orlando)
- New York (NYC metro, Long Island, upstate)
- Pennsylvania (Philadelphia, Pittsburgh)
- Michigan (Detroit metro)
- Illinois (Chicago area)
- And many more states across the US

## For Classic Car Owners
Whether you own a 1960s Porsche 911, a classic American muscle car, a British roadster, or any other vintage vehicle, ClassicWrench helps you find the right specialist for your needs. Our verified mechanics have the expertise, tools, and passion to properly care for your classic automobile.

## Contact Information
Website: https://classicwrench.com
Industry: Automotive Directory Services
Focus: Classic Car Restoration and Maintenance

## Last Updated
This information is current as of 2024 and reflects our growing directory of classic car specialists across America.
